description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called pages that runs in the default test stage using the fedora:25 Docker image. The job is manual (when: manual) and produces a public artifact by executing the script steps: mkdir public, ./fedora-wsl-builder.sh, and mv ${HOME}/fedora-*-wsl.tar.gz ./public. The artifacts paths include the public directory. No services, caches, or extra variables are defined. The job deploys the public folder to GitLab Pages.
